summary: Family child care voucher enrollment has roughly doubled since Fiscal 2022, tracking the same citywide expansion seen across all voucher types. ACS credits the growth to the March 2023 launch of MyCity, the city's first online child care application system, and expanded outreach that dramatically increased use of non-mandated, low-income vouchers among eligible families.

sources.label: ACS, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report
